text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Uh, yeah, I'm a fan... But what's this outta the
blue?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Good, I'll pass that on to Sis.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
H-hold up a sec! Why're you gettin' your sister
involved?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You should eat well on your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Like I said, today is your birthday. So I plan to
serve you the tastiest food I know of.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Ahaha, you mean Hayahide's curry? Well,
your explanation was half-assed as hell, but you
can be a real sweetheart sometimes, eh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...If you don't want it, no sweat off my back.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I didn't say that. Here, how 'bout we go find
that sister of yours and ask her to make me some
curry?
